q.en: Who is accountable for maximizing the value of the product resulting from the work of the Scrum Team?
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za maksimiranje vrednosti izdelka, ki je rezultat dela Scrum tima?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Product Owner
The Developers
The stakeholders

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for maximizing the value of the product. This is the central accountability of the role per the Scrum Guide 2020.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za maksimiranje vrednosti izdelka. To je osrednja odgovornost te vloge po Scrum Guides 2020.

q.en: The Product Owner is:
q.sl: Product Owner je:

options.en: A committee of business representatives
One person, not a committee
A role shared between a business owner and a tech lead
options.sl: Vloga, deljena med lastnika poslovanja in tehničnega vodje

options.en: Any Developer who knows the business

why.en: The Product Owner is one person, not a committee. They may represent the needs of many stakeholders, but the accountability cannot be divided.
why.sl: Product Owner je ena oseba, ne odbor. Lahko zastopa potrebe številnih deležnikov, vendar odgovornost ne more biti deljena.

q.en: The Product Owner may delegate work related to the Product Backlog to others, but remains accountable.
q.sl: Product Owner lahko delegira delo, povezano s produktnim seznamom, drugim, vendar ostaja odgovoren.

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Product Owner may do the work themselves or delegate it, but they remain accountable for the outcome.
why.sl: Drži. Product Owner lahko delo opravi sam ali ga delegira, vendar ostaja odgovoren za rezultat.

q.en: Who has final authority over the order of the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kdo ima končno avtoriteto nad vrstnim redom produktnega seznama?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The most senior stakeholder
The Product Owner
The Developers by consensus

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for ordering the Product Backlog. Others may influence or suggest order, but the decision rests with the Product Owner.
why.sl: Product Owner ima končno avtoriteto in odgovornost za produktni seznam, vključno z njegovim vrstnim redom.

q.en: Who has the authority to cancel a Sprint?
q.sl: Kdo ima avtoriteto za preklic Sprinta?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Developers
Only the Product Owner
Stakeholders or management

why.en: Only the Product Owner can cancel a Sprint. This would typically happen if the Sprint Goal becomes obsolete.
why.sl: Product Owner ima avtoriteto za preklic Sprinta. Čeprav je to redko, je to njegova vloga in odgovornost.

q.en: Which of the following are characteristics of an effective Product Owner? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je primarni fokus Product Ownerja v Sprinta?

options.en: Has authority over the Product Backlog and ordering decisions
options.sl: Ima avtoriteto nad Seznamom Izdelka in odločitvami o ureditvi

options.en: Is available to the Scrum Team and stakeholders
options.sl: Je na voljo Scrum timu in deležnikom

options.en: Has deep knowledge of the product domain and customers
options.sl: Ima globoke znanje o domeni izdelka in potrošnikih

options.en: Personally writes every Product Backlog item
options.sl: Osebno piše vsak element Seznama Izdelka

options.en: Makes technical implementation decisions for the Developers
options.sl: Sprejema odločitve o tehničnih podrobnostih izvajanja za Razvijalce

options.en: Orders the Product Backlog to maximize value
options.sl: Uredi Seznam Izdelka, da maksimira vrednost

why.en: An effective Product Owner has authority, is available, is domain-knowledgeable, and orders the backlog for maximum value. Writing every item personally isn't required — anyone can contribute items. Technical implementation decisions belong to the Developers.
why.sl: Primarni fokus Product Ownerja je maksimiranje vrednosti in ROI. To je poglavitni cilj vloge.

q.en: For a Product Owner to succeed, the entire organization must respect their decisions.
q.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna Scrum timu:

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Scrum Guide 2020 explicitly states that for Product Owners to succeed, the entire organization must respect their decisions.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna skozi Scrum tim vsak delovni dan. To je bistveno za uspešno sodelovanje in odločanje.

q.en: The Product Owner must personally write every Product Backlog item.
q.sl: Kaj mora Product Owner storiti pred začetkom Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Anyone on the Scrum Team, or even stakeholders, can draft Product Backlog items. The Product Owner is accountable for the backlog as a whole, including what gets added, ordered, and refined.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna za vprašanja in razjasnitve. Cilje ne izbira Product Owner, temveč jih skupaj dogovori tim.

q.en: The Product Backlog is:
q.sl: Kaj so glavne odgovornosti Product Ownerja?

options.en: A fixed scope document signed off at the start of the project
An emergent, ordered list of what is needed to improve the product
A list of technical tasks for the Developers
A prioritized feature roadmap owned by stakeholders

why.en: The Product Backlog is an emergent and ordered list of what is needed to improve the product. It is the single source of work undertaken by the Scrum Team.
why.sl: Glavne odgovornosti so upravljanje produktnega seznama in komuniciranje z deležniki. Razvoj kode in nadzor kakovosti sta odgovornosti Razvijalcev.

q.en: Product Backlog refinement is best described as:
q.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za:

options.en: A formal Scrum event held weekly
A time-boxed meeting led by the Scrum Master
An ongoing activity to add detail, estimates, and order to items
An activity the Product Owner does alone

why.en: Refinement is an ongoing activity — not a formal event. The Scrum Team collaboratively adds detail, estimates, and order to items. The Product Owner is accountable for the outcome.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za kaj bo izdelek in zakaj. Tehnične odločitve in kako bo tim delo izvedel je v domeni Razvijalcev.

q.en: A Product Backlog item is considered 'Done' when:
q.sl: Kaj je primarna vloga Product Ownerja pri Izpopolnjevanju?

options.en: The Product Owner accepts it
It is deployed to production
options.sl: Razjasniti mora zahteve in sprejeti merila

options.en: It meets the Definition of Done
All acceptance criteria are ticked

why.en: An item is Done when it meets the Definition of Done. At that moment, it becomes part of the Increment.
why.sl: Primarna vloga je razjasniti zahteve in sprejeti merila za sprejemljivost. To je bistveno za kakovostno dokumentacijo zahtev.

q.en: Which attributes are commonly associated with Product Backlog items? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kako pogosto mora biti produktni seznam Izpopolnjevan?

options.en: Description
Order
Size (estimate)
Value
Name of the developer assigned to it
A firm delivery date

why.en: Scrum Guide attributes of Product Backlog items are typically description, order, size, and value. Scrum does not assign items to specific developers, and does not require firm delivery dates on items.
why.sl: Produktni seznam mora biti kontinuirano Izpopolnjevan skozi Sprintom. To je tekoč proces, ne enkratna aktivnost.

q.en: What should guide the Product Owner in ordering the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za sprotne dodatne stroške poslovanja?

options.en: Strictly the estimated effort, lowest first
Stakeholder seniority and political power
Value, risk, priority, dependencies, and what best achieves product goals
Development team velocity

why.en: The Product Owner orders the Product Backlog based on what best achieves the product's goals — weighing value, risk, priority, and dependencies. It is not a pure effort-sort or politics-sort.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za sprejemanje poslovnih odločitev, vključno s stroški in vrednostjo, ki jo prinese razvoj.

q.en: How much of the Product Backlog should be refined at any given time?
q.sl: Product Owner je:

options.en: The entire Product Backlog at all times
options.sl: Pogajalec med razvojnim timom in poslovanjem

options.en: Enough that items for the next Sprint are 'ready' and understood
Only the top item
options.sl: Tisti, ki ima vizijo za izdelek

options.en: Exactly 10% of total effort per the Scrum Guide

why.en: Refinement is ongoing. Items near the top of the Product Backlog should be refined enough to be ready for Sprint Planning. The '10%' rule is not in the 2020 Scrum Guide.
why.sl: Product Owner je pogajalec, nadzornik produktnega seznama in ima vizijo za izdelek. Vse zgoraj navedeno je točno.

q.en: Anyone can suggest items for the Product Backlog, but the Product Owner decides what is added and how it is ordered.
q.sl: Kaj je Cilj izdelka?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Anyone can propose items. The Product Owner is accountable for what ends up in the Product Backlog and in what order.
why.sl: Cilj izdelka je dolgoročna vizija izdelka. Cilj Sprinta je kratkoročni cilj za en Sprint.

q.en: Transparency of the Product Backlog is essential for empirical product management.
q.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za tvorjenje:

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Transparency is one of the three pillars of empiricism. Without a transparent Product Backlog, inspection and adaptation are compromised.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovorna za tvorjenje Cilja izdelka. Cilj Sprinta je ustvarjen skupaj s Scrum timom.

q.en: The Product Goal describes:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k Definiciji Končanega?

options.en: A short-term delivery target for the next Sprint
options.sl: Ima jo v celoti pod kontrolo

options.en: A future state of the product — a long-term objective for the Scrum Team
options.sl: Product Owner je vpletena, vendar jo imajo Razvijalci bolj pod kontrolo

options.en: A binding release commitment to customers
options.sl: Product Owner je direktno odgovorna za to

options.en: A list of features to be built this quarter
options.sl: Product Owner ne vpliva na to

why.en: The Product Goal is the long-term objective for the Scrum Team — a future state of the product. It provides direction for the Scrum Team's work.
why.sl: Razvijalci so odgovorni za Definicijo Končanega. Product Owner je vključena v razprave in prilagoditve, ki vplivajo na vrednost.

q.en: The Product Goal is the commitment for which artifact?
q.sl: Product Owner mora imeti znanje o:

options.en: The Sprint Backlog
The Increment
The Product Backlog
The Definition of Done

why.en: The three commitments: Product Goal commits to the Product Backlog, Sprint Goal commits to the Sprint Backlog, Definition of Done commits to the Increment.
why.sl: Product Owner mora imeti znanje o tehnologiji in poslovanju. To je potrebno za učinkovito sprejemanje odločitev.

q.en: How many Product Goals can a Scrum Team pursue at the same time?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše za Product Ownerja pri upravljanju produktnega seznama?

options.en: As many as stakeholders request
One
One per Sprint
One per release

why.en: A Scrum Team focuses on one Product Goal at a time. They must fulfill (or abandon) the current Product Goal before taking on the next.
why.sl: Najpomembnejše je maksimiranje vrednosti. To je osrednji cilj Scrum in Product Ownerja.

q.en: Who is accountable for developing and explicitly communicating the Product Goal?
q.sl: Product Owner mora biti v stiku z:

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Developers
The Product Owner
The stakeholders

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for developing and explicitly communicating the Product Goal — a core responsibility listed in the Scrum Guide 2020.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti v stiku z Scrum timom in deležniki. To je bistveno za uspešno upravljanje vrednosti.

q.en: The Product Goal is contained in the Product Backlog.
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri testiranju?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Scrum Guide 2020 states: 'The Product Goal is in the Product Backlog. The rest of the Product Backlog emerges to define what will fulfill the Product Goal.'
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna za pojasnjene in sprejetje. Testiranje je odgovornost Razvijalcev.

q.en: What is the primary purpose of the Sprint Review?
q.sl: Product Owner je odgovorna za:

options.en: A formal acceptance meeting where stakeholders sign off
A status report to management
Inspect the Increment and adapt the Product Backlog through collaboration
options.sl: Kako je vrednost merjena in dokazana

options.en: Retrospect on the Sprint process

why.en: The Sprint Review is a working session to inspect the Increment and discuss what to do next. The Product Backlog may be adjusted based on new information. It is not a sign-off meeting or a status report.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovorna za to, kako je vrednost merjena in dokazana. To je del upravljanja produktnega seznama.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, who proposes how the product could increase its value in the current Sprint?
q.sl: Kaj mora Product Owner narediti s povratno informacijo od deležnikov?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Product Owner
options.sl: Spremeniti jo mora v postavke produktnega seznama

options.en: The Developers
options.sl: Jo mora upoštevati pri upravljanju produktnega seznama

options.en: Stakeholders
options.sl: Jo mora ognoti drugim članom tima

why.en: In Sprint Planning Topic One ('Why is this Sprint valuable?'), the Product Owner proposes how the product could increase its value. The whole Scrum Team then collaborates to define a Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Product Owner mora povratne informacije upoštevati pri upravljanju produktnega seznama. Vendar ne mora vse spremeniti v postavke.

q.en: Who must attend the Daily Scrum?
q.sl: Product Owner mora biti:

options.en: The entire Scrum Team plus stakeholders
The Developers. The Product Owner attends if actively working on items
The Product Owner and Scrum Master only
The Scrum Master leads it

why.en: The Daily Scrum is for the Developers. The Product Owner or Scrum Master participate only if actively working on Sprint Backlog items as Developers.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna. To je ključno za uspešno sodelovanje.

q.en: The Product Owner should attend the Sprint Retrospective.
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja pri Pregledoma Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Sprint Retrospective is for the whole Scrum Team, including the Product Owner. Its purpose is to identify improvements to people, interactions, processes, tools, and the Definition of Done.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna za povratne informacije. Ni odgovorna za napake.

q.en: Who determines how many Product Backlog items are selected for a Sprint?
q.sl: Kaj je Cilj Sprinta?

options.en: The Product Owner, based on business priorities
options.sl: Izpolniti vse postavke v Sprint seznama dela

options.en: The Scrum Master, based on past velocity
The Developers, forecasting what they can accomplish — in collaboration with the Product Owner
options.sl: En sam cilj, ki ga želi Scrum tim doseči

options.en: Stakeholders, during Sprint Planning
options.sl: Dovolj dokončati, da se projekt zaključi

why.en: The Developers forecast what they can accomplish during the Sprint. They collaborate with the Product Owner on selection, but the capacity decision belongs to the Developers.
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je en sam cilj, ki ga želi Scrum tim doseči. To je vrednost, ne samo postavke.

q.en: An Increment must be released to customers by the end of the Sprint.
q.sl: Kdo je odgovoren za tvorjenje Cilja Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Increment must meet the Definition of Done by the end of the Sprint, but release to customers is a separate decision made by the Product Owner.
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je ustvaren skupaj s Scrum timom. To je kolaborativni proces.

q.en: How often can Increments potentially be delivered to users?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Product Owner med Sprintom postane nedostopna?

options.en: Only at the end of each Sprint
options.sl: Tim mora postati sam Product Owner

options.en: Once per release cycle
Multiple times per Sprint — any time an item meets the Definition of Done
options.sl: Razvijalci lahko sami spremenijo Cilj Sprinta

options.en: Only after stakeholder approval at Sprint Review
options.sl: Scrum tim ima težave s Sprintom

why.en: Multiple Increments may be created within a single Sprint. An Increment can be delivered to stakeholders as soon as it meets the Definition of Done — no need to wait for Sprint end or Review.
why.sl: Nedostopnost Product Ownerja je problem za tim in Sprintom.

q.en: The Product Owner decides when to release an Increment to customers.
q.sl: Product Owner ne sme biti:

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The release decision rests with the Product Owner, who balances value, risk, and market considerations.
why.sl: Product Owner ne sme biti odgovorna samo za tehnične odločitve. To je vloga Razvijalcev.

q.en: A stakeholder approaches the Developers mid-Sprint with an urgent request. What is the most appropriate response?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za Inkremente?

options.en: The Developers add it immediately to be responsive
The Scrum Master adds it to the Sprint Backlog
The request is directed to the Product Owner, who may adjust the backlog or renegotiate Sprint scope
options.sl: Biti mora dostopna za povratne informacije

options.en: The Sprint is cancelled to allow replanning

why.en: Stakeholder requests go through the Product Owner. The PO decides whether the request enters the Product Backlog, and may renegotiate Sprint scope with the Developers — as long as the Sprint Goal is not compromised.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna za povratne informacije. Sprejemanje mora biti odločeno.

q.en: Two senior stakeholders disagree strongly on what should be prioritized next. What should the Product Owner do?
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k Retrospektivi Sprinta?

options.en: Escalate the decision to executive leadership
options.sl: Ne sodeluje - to je samo za Razvijalce

options.en: Let the stakeholders vote
Use their own judgment to order by value and communicate the rationale
Split the Sprint 50/50 between both requests

why.en: The Product Owner is the single accountable person for maximizing product value. They take input from stakeholders but make the ordering decision themselves, with clear rationale.
why.sl: Product Owner je aktivni udeleženec Retrospektive. Ima dragocene povratne informacije.

q.en: The Product Owner should measure product success primarily through:
q.sl: Kaj mora Product Owner narediti z Inkrementmom, ki ne izpolnjuje pričakovanj?

options.en: Developer velocity and story points completed
Number of features delivered per Sprint
options.sl: Zahtevati mora, da ga Razvijalci popravijo

options.en: Outcomes and value delivered to customers and business
options.sl: Sprejeti ga mora čeprav je slab

options.en: On-time, on-budget delivery against the plan

why.en: Scrum is empirical and value-driven. A Product Owner focuses on outcomes — did this increase customer or business value? — rather than output metrics like velocity or feature count.
why.sl: Product Owner mora dati povratne informacije. Jasna pričakovanja so ključna.

q.en: The Sprint Review is the only appropriate time for the Product Owner to engage stakeholders.
q.sl: Product Owner mora biti:

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Sprint Review is one structured opportunity for stakeholder engagement, but the Product Owner may and should collaborate with stakeholders throughout the Sprint as needed.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti strokovnjak za domeno in poslovanje. To je bistveno.

q.en: When multiple Scrum Teams work together on the same product, they share:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri Dnevnem Scrumu?

options.en: One Scrum Master and one Sprint Backlog
One Product Goal, one Product Backlog, and one Product Owner
The same Sprint Goal across all teams
options.sl: Biti mora dostopna za odgovore na vprašanja

options.en: Different Product Owners per component

why.en: Even at scale, a single product has one Product Goal, one Product Backlog, and one Product Owner. This preserves a single source of direction and value.
why.sl: Product Owner ni obavezna biti prisotna. Vendar je dragoceno biti dostopna.

q.en: Which are the three pillars of empiricism? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kako Product Owner pomaga zmanjšati tveganja v Sprintu?

options.en: Transparency
Inspection
Adaptation
Commitment
Focus

why.en: Empiricism in Scrum rests on three pillars: Transparency, Inspection, and Adaptation. Commitment and Focus are Scrum Values, not pillars.
why.sl: Product Owner pomaga zmanjšati tveganja z vsem zgoraj navedenim. Vse je bistveno.

q.en: Which are the five Scrum Values? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Product Owner mora biti:

options.en: Commitment
Focus
Openness
Respect
Courage
Trust
Transparency

why.en: The five Scrum Values are Commitment, Focus, Openness, Respect, and Courage. Trust is a consequence of living the values. Transparency is a pillar of empiricism, not a value.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti zastopnica za vse deležnike. To je njena ključna vloga.

q.en: The Sprint Goal is:
q.sl: Kaj je cilj Product Ownerja med Sprintom?

options.en: A list of all work selected for the Sprint
The single objective for the Sprint and the commitment for the Sprint Backlog
A target release date
The Product Owner's forecast for the quarter

why.en: The Sprint Goal is the single objective for the Sprint. It is the commitment for the Sprint Backlog and is created collaboratively by the Scrum Team during Sprint Planning.
why.sl: Cilj je biti dostopna in podpora timu. Spremembe med Sprintom so redke.

q.en: The Product Owner is asked to push a release date forward despite the Developers warning that quality would suffer. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Override the Developers — release dates are the PO's authority
Collaborate with the Developers to understand trade-offs, potentially reducing scope rather than quality
Cancel the Sprint and replan from scratch
Escalate to management and let them decide

why.en: The Product Owner maximizes product value — long-term as well as short-term. Shipping below the Definition of Done creates technical debt and erodes value. The healthy path is scope negotiation with the Developers, not quality compromise.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti odprtih do sprememb, toda spremembe prioritet med Sprintom so redke.

q.en: Ordering the Product Backlog means:
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za Hitrost?

options.en: Sorting items alphabetically
Arranging items by what delivers the most value in that order
options.sl: Razumeti jo mora in jo uporabiti pri načrtovanju

options.en: Letting the highest-paid stakeholder decide
options.sl: Zahtevati mora, da Razvijalci delajo hitreje

options.en: Using only story points

why.en: Ordering is about value. Many inputs feed the decision — value, risk, dependencies, learning — but the PO is accountable for the final order.
why.sl: Product Owner mora razumeti Hitrost in jo uporabiti pri načrtovanju. To je ključ do boljšega načrtovanja.

q.en: A Product Owner spends most Sprints writing detailed specifications. Developers rarely speak to stakeholders directly. What is the likely problem?
q.sl: Kaj mora Product Owner narediti, če Hitrost pada?

options.en: The Scrum Master should write the specifications instead
The Product Owner has slipped into being a requirements analyst rather than a value-maximizer
options.sl: Razumeti mora razloge in skupaj rešiti problem

options.en: Nothing — this is how the Product Owner accountability is meant to work
The Developers should take over stakeholder communication

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for maximizing value, not for producing detailed specifications. When the PO becomes a spec-writing middle layer and Developers are disconnected from stakeholders, the team loses the direct collaboration empirical product management depends on.
why.sl: Product Owner mora razumeti razloge in skupaj s timom rešiti problem. To je skupni trud.

q.en: For the Product Owner to succeed, the entire organization must:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k večji vrednosti?

options.en: Micromanage the PO's decisions
Respect the Product Owner's decisions
options.sl: Z jasnim definiranjem prioritet in vrednosti

options.en: Let Developers override the PO
Delegate all PO responsibilities to a committee

why.en: Per the Scrum Guide 2020: 'For Product Owners to succeed, the entire organization must respect their decisions.' These decisions are visible in the Product Backlog and Increment.
why.sl: Product Owner prispeva s jasnim definiranjem prioritet in vrednosti. To je osrednja vloga.

q.en: Stakeholder pressure is pushing the Product Owner to include low-value items in the next Sprint. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Comply — stakeholders fund the product
Accept input but decide based on value, communicating rationale clearly
Defer the decision to the Scrum Master
Split the Sprint across unrelated work

why.en: The PO is accountable for maximizing value. Stakeholders are input sources; ordering is the PO's decision. Transparency about rationale builds trust.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti fleksibilna. Vendar spremembe morajo biti odločene.

q.en: Which Product Backlog item attributes are commonly used?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri Izpopolnjevanju?

options.en: Description, order, size, and sometimes value estimate
Only story points
Assignee, due date, and priority label
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna, pojasniti zahteve in sprejeti pogoje

options.en: Author, approver, and department

why.en: PBIs often have: description, order, size, and may include value. The PO is accountable for these. Size is the Developers' call; value is the PO's.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri Izpopolnjevanju. Njena vloga je pojasniti in sprejeti pogoje.

q.en: The Product Backlog is ever-changing as long as the product exists.
q.sl: Kako Product Owner vpliva na kvaliteto Inkrementuma?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Product Backlog is dynamic and emerges as the product and its environment evolve. Refinement is an ongoing activity.
why.sl: Product Owner vpliva na kvaliteto s tem, da jasno definira zahteve in kriterije. Vse je bistveno.

q.en: A Product Backlog item is 'ready' for selection in Sprint Planning when:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: The PO has signed off on acceptance criteria
It is small enough to fit in a Sprint and sufficiently understood by the Developers
All edge cases are exhaustively documented
QA has reviewed it

why.en: Scrum doesn't formalize 'ready', but PBIs selected into a Sprint should be sized and understood well enough that Developers can reasonably commit to delivering them.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti ena oseba, dedikirana enemu produktu. To zagotavlja jasne odgovornosti.

q.en: Product Backlog refinement typically involves:
q.sl: Kaj mora Product Owner narediti s povratkami od uporabnikov?

options.en: The Product Owner alone
The Scrum Team collaborating to break down items and size them
options.sl: Jih uporabiti pri upravljanju produktnega seznama

options.en: The Scrum Master assigning tasks
options.sl: Jih dati samo za tehnični tim

options.en: Stakeholders voting on items

why.en: Refinement is a Scrum Team activity — the PO drives value and order, the Developers contribute sizing and technical insight, and the SM facilitates.
why.sl: Product Owner mora povratke uporabiti pri upravljanju produktnega seznama. To je dragocen vir.

q.en: Estimating Product Backlog items is the Product Owner's accountability.
q.sl: Kako Product Owner zagotavlja, da je delo fokusirano na vrednost?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The people performing the work — the Developers — are responsible for sizing. The PO may influence by helping them understand trade-offs.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja fokus na vrednost z jasnim definiranjem vrednosti. To je ključno.

q.en: Who performs the estimation of Product Backlog items?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri obvladovanju tveganj?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master
The Developers
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri identifikaciji in upravljanju poslovnih tveganj

options.en: Stakeholders
options.sl: Biti mora glavni odgovorna za tehnična tveganja

why.en: Developers are accountable for sizing since they perform the work. They may seek input from the PO to understand business context.
why.sl: Product Owner je aktivna pri identifikaciji in upravljanju poslovnih tveganj. To je del njene vloge.

q.en: When is a Product Goal abandoned?
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Never — it is fixed
When obsolete, a new Product Goal replaces it
Only at the end of the fiscal quarter
When stakeholders vote to change it

why.en: A Scrum Team pursues one Product Goal at a time. It may be abandoned if it becomes obsolete; a new Product Goal then replaces it. The PO makes this call.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti kritična pri preverjanju. Sprejemanje je njena odgovornost.

q.en: How does the Product Goal relate to the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za deležnike?

options.en: They are unrelated
The Product Goal is the commitment for the backlog; the Backlog emerges to fulfill the Goal
The Product Backlog replaces the Product Goal
options.sl: Biti njihova zastopnica v Scrum timu

options.en: The Product Goal is ordered within the Sprint Backlog

why.en: The Product Goal is the long-term objective and commitment for the Product Backlog. The Product Backlog emerges to define what will fulfill the Product Goal.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti zastopnica deležnikov v Scrum timu. To je ključna vloga.

q.en: A Scrum Team can pursue multiple Product Goals simultaneously.
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k uspešnosti Sprintov?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. A Scrum Team pursues one Product Goal at a time. The current Goal must be fulfilled or abandoned before a new one is adopted.
why.sl: Product Owner prispeva s jasno komunikacijo in dostopnostjo. To zmanjšuje negotovost.

q.en: Evidence-Based Management (EBM) helps organizations:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Enforce uniform processes across teams
Measure and improve value delivery through empirical evidence and experimentation
Replace Scrum Masters with dashboards
Track developer productivity per hour

why.en: EBM is a framework for improving value delivery through evidence — outcomes, goals, and measured experiments — rather than output or activity.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti za vsak Scrum tim. To je ključna vloga v Scrumu.

q.en: Which of the following are Key Value Areas (KVAs) in Evidence-Based Management? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri spremembi zahtev?

options.en: Current Value
Unrealized Value
Velocity
Ability to Innovate
Time to Market
Cost Efficiency

why.en: EBM defines four Key Value Areas: Current Value (CV), Unrealized Value (UV), Ability to Innovate (A2I), and Time to Market (T2M). Velocity and cost efficiency are not KVAs.
why.sl: Product Owner mora spremembe zahtev oceniti in vključiti v produktni seznam. To je del upravljanja vrednosti.

q.en: Which of these is an outcome-based measure?
q.sl: Kako Product Owner vpliva na inovativnost?

options.en: Number of features released
Story points completed per Sprint
Customer satisfaction or retention
Lines of code produced

why.en: Outcome measures reflect value delivered (satisfaction, retention, revenue, usage). Output measures (features, story points, LoC) are activity, not value.
why.sl: Product Owner vpliva na inovativnost z zagotavljanjem prostora za eksperimentiranje. To je del sodobnega Scruma.

q.en: Which approach best reflects empirical product management?
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Build the complete product to the initial plan
Release, measure, learn, adapt — iteratively based on real-world feedback
Defer all releases until the product is feature-complete
Spend a year on detailed requirements before building

why.en: Empirical product management uses frequent releases and validated learning to decide what to build next. It embraces uncertainty rather than pretending plans are reliable.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti tehnična in poslovna oseba. Oboje je dragoceno.

q.en: Velocity is a reliable measure of the value a product delivers.
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za Definicijo Končanega?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Velocity measures throughput, not value. A team can move fast and still build the wrong things. Value requires outcome measurement.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je skupna odgovornost. Razvijalci jo določijo, Product Owner pa zagotavlja poslovne vidike.

q.en: Which Evidence-Based Management measure best captures the value the product delivers to users today?
q.sl: Kako Product Owner zagotavlja skladnost z zahtevkami?

options.en: Velocity of the Scrum Team
Number of Product Backlog items completed per Sprint
Current Value — the value the product delivers to users today
Number of releases shipped this quarter

why.en: Current Value is the EBM Key Value Area that captures the value the product actually delivers to users right now. Velocity and item counts describe activity; release count describes throughput. Value is measured by outcomes for customers and the business.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja skladnost z jasno definicijo zahtev, dostopnostjo in testiranjem. Vse je bistveno.

q.en: If an Increment meets the Definition of Done mid-Sprint, the Product Owner should:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Wait for the Sprint Review to release it
Decide whether releasing immediately creates more value than waiting
Cancel the Sprint
Get stakeholder approval first

why.en: An Increment can be released any time it meets the DoD. The PO balances value, risk, and timing to make release decisions.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti dostopna po potrebi. Kontinuirana dostopnost je ideal.

q.en: A Minimum Viable Product (MVP) is:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri Cilju Sprinta?

options.en: A buggy prototype released to meet deadlines
options.sl: Ima ga v celoti pod kontrolo

options.en: The smallest release that delivers enough value to validate learning from real users
options.sl: Razvijalci ga imajo v celoti pod kontrolo

options.en: The final polished version of the product
options.sl: Je skupno odgovorna s Scrum timom

options.en: A demo shown only to internal stakeholders

why.en: MVP is a learning tool — the smallest release that enables validated learning from real users. It tests hypotheses about value, not corner-cuts quality.
why.sl: Product Owner je skupno odgovorna za Cilj Sprinta s Scrum timom. To je kolaborativen proces.

q.en: When forecasting future delivery, the Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k zmanjšanju odpadkov?

options.en: Provide firm commitments with fixed scope and dates
Provide forecasts based on empirical data, acknowledging they change as learning occurs
options.sl: Z jasnim definiranjem prioritet in vrednosti

options.en: Refuse to forecast at all
Delegate forecasting to the Scrum Master

why.en: Empirical forecasting draws on actual throughput and outcomes. Forecasts are honest probabilistic statements, not binding long-range commitments.
why.sl: Product Owner prispeva k zmanjšanju odpadkov z jasnim definiranjem prioritet in vrednosti. To je ključno.

q.en: How often should the Product Owner engage stakeholders?
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Only at the Sprint Review
Continuously throughout the Sprint when collaboration helps
Once per release cycle
Only through formal reports

why.en: The Sprint Review is one structured checkpoint, but the PO engages stakeholders continuously. Frequent interaction protects against building the wrong thing.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti odločevalka in zastopnica. Obe vlogi sta bistveni.

q.en: The top of the Product Backlog is full of large, vague items that Developers cannot plan against. What should happen?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za Inkremente?

options.en: The Product Owner decides alone which items are ready
The Scrum Team collaboratively refines items so top-of-backlog items are small and clear
Developers refuse to plan until the Product Owner has written full specifications
options.sl: Biti mora dostopna za povratne informacije in sprejeti jih mora

options.en: Sprint Planning is skipped until the entire backlog is refined

why.en: Product Backlog refinement is an ongoing collaborative activity. The Product Owner is accountable for the backlog, but refining items — breaking them down, adding detail, ordering — works best as a shared activity so Developers can surface questions and reach shared understanding.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti dostopna za povratne informacije in sprejeti Inkremente. To je njena vloga.

q.en: The best indicator that a product is delivering value is:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner zagotavlja uspešnost Sprintov?

options.en: Continuous high velocity over multiple Sprints
Consistently low defect counts in releases
options.sl: Z jasno komunikacijo in omogočanjem tima

options.en: Measurable positive outcomes for customers and business (usage, satisfaction, revenue, retention)
Delivering more features per Sprint than competitors

why.en: Value is measured through outcomes, not output. Velocity, feature count, and bug counts can be misleading proxies.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja uspešnost s jasna komunikacijo in omogočanjem tima. To je ključno.

q.en: 'Time to Market' in Evidence-Based Management refers to:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: The length of Sprint Planning
The organization's ability to deliver new capabilities and services quickly
The time from hiring to onboarding
options.sl: Fokusirana na kratko in dolgoročne cilje

options.en: The elapsed time between Sprint events

why.en: Time to Market (T2M) measures an organization's capacity to deliver new value to customers quickly. Shorter T2M typically increases the rate of learning and value capture.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti fokusirana na kratko in dolgoročne cilje. Oboje je potrebno.

q.en: A Product Owner is unsure whether a proposed feature will deliver value. The best approach is to:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri meritvi vrednosti?

options.en: Avoid building it
Build the complete feature to be safe
Build a small, testable version and measure the outcome
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri definiranju in meritvi vrednosti

options.en: Delegate the decision to stakeholders

why.en: When uncertainty is high, small experiments and validated learning outperform big upfront bets. This is empirical product management in action.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri definiranju in meritvi vrednosti. To je osrednja del njene vloge.

q.en: The Product Owner is accountable for maximizing value — including long-term value, not only short-term delivery.
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k pregledu?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The PO's accountability for value spans time horizons. Short-term wins that damage long-term value are a bad trade.
why.sl: Product Owner prispeva k pregledu z aktivnim poslušanjem in upoštevanjem povratnih informacij. To je ključno.

q.en: A product vision:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Is a detailed list of every feature
Describes a future state and direction, aligning the Scrum Team and stakeholders
Is the same as the Product Goal
options.sl: Generalista z znanjem tehnike in poslovanja

options.en: Is strictly mandated by the Scrum Guide

why.en: A product vision sets overarching direction. The Scrum Guide doesn't mandate it, but in practice it anchors the Product Goal and the PO's ordering decisions.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti generalista z znanjem tehnike in poslovanja. Oboje je dragoceno.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, who is accountable for ensuring a Sprint Goal is defined?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za zadovoljstvo uporabnikov?

options.en: The Product Owner alone
The Developers alone
The entire Scrum Team collaborates on the Sprint Goal
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri zagotavljanju zadovoljstva uporabnikov

options.en: The Scrum Master writes it

why.en: The Sprint Goal is crafted collaboratively. The PO proposes value; the whole Scrum Team shapes the Goal. The Sprint Goal is the commitment for the Sprint Backlog.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri zagotavljanju zadovoljstva uporabnikov. To je del njene vloge.

q.en: A Scrum Team has been pursuing a Product Goal for several months, and recent market evidence suggests the Goal no longer reflects what customers need. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner vpliva na skladnost?

options.en: Keep working toward the original Goal to honor the commitment
Inspect whether the Goal is still valid and, if not, replace it with one that reflects current learning
options.sl: Z jasnim definiranjem zahtev in kontrolo skladnosti

options.en: Cancel the product and start a new one from scratch
Ask the Developers to work harder during the next few Sprints

why.en: A Product Goal is a long-term commitment, but not an immovable one. When evidence shows the Goal is no longer valid, the Product Owner inspects and adapts — replacing it with a Goal that reflects what has been learned. Clinging to an invalid Goal violates empiricism.
why.sl: Product Owner vpliva na skladnost z jasnim definiranjem zahtev in kontrolo skladnosti. To je ključno.

q.en: Which of the following happen during a Sprint Review? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: The Scrum Team and stakeholders inspect the Increment
options.sl: Scrum tim in deležniki pregledajo Inkrement

options.en: The Product Backlog may be adjusted based on new information
options.sl: Seznam Izdelka se lahko prilagodi na podlagi novih informacij

options.en: Stakeholders formally sign off on completed work
The Scrum Team gets approval to release
options.sl: Scrum timu je odobreno, da sprosti izdajo

options.en: Progress toward the Product Goal is discussed
options.sl: Napredek proti Cilju Izdelka se razpravlja

why.en: Sprint Review is a working session: inspect the Increment, adapt the Product Backlog, discuss progress toward the Product Goal. It is not a sign-off or approval meeting.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti v pisarnah in na terenu. Oboje je potrebno.

q.en: How does the Product Owner collaborate with Developers during the Sprint?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri učenju in izboljšavah?

options.en: Not at all — Developers work independently
Continuously — answering questions and making trade-off decisions
Only during Sprint Planning
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri spodbujanju učenja in izboljšav

options.en: Through written tickets only

why.en: Ongoing collaboration is essential. Decisions about scope, clarity of items, and value trade-offs happen throughout the Sprint, not only at events.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri spodbujanju učenja in izboljšav. To je del Scrum kulture.

q.en: When scaling Scrum to multiple teams on the same product:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner zagotavlja prilagodljivost?

options.en: Each team has its own Product Owner
There is still one Product Owner accountable for the product
options.sl: Z jasna vizijo in fleksibilnimi detajli

options.en: Teams work on separate products
No Product Owner is needed

why.en: Even at scale, a single product has one Product Goal, one Product Backlog, and one Product Owner — preserving a single source of value direction.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja prilagodljivost z jasna vizijo in fleksibilnimi detajli. To je ključno.

q.en: How does empiricism apply to product management?
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: By avoiding experimentation
By using observation and experimentation to discover what delivers value
By strictly adhering to a long-term plan
options.sl: Oseba z razumevanjem tehnike in poslovanja

options.en: By requiring signoff before every decision

why.en: Empiricism says knowledge comes from experience and decisions are based on what's observed. In product management, that means measuring, learning, and adapting.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti oseba z razumevanjem tehnike in poslovanja. Oboje je dragoceno.

q.en: How should the Product Owner align product decisions with business strategy?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Product Ownerja za konkurenčnost?

options.en: They shouldn't — Scrum ignores business strategy
Ensure the Product Goal and ordering reflect and advance strategic objectives
Defer all decisions to executives
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri zagotavljanju konkurenčnosti

options.en: Maximize feature count

why.en: The Product Goal translates strategy into a product direction. Ordering reflects what best advances that direction, given current evidence.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri zagotavljanju konkurenčnosti. To je del upravljanja vrednosti.

q.en: Which of the following is MOST important for the Product Owner to focus on?
q.sl: Kako Product Owner prispeva k trajnosti?

options.en: Writing detailed specifications
Estimating work accurately
options.sl: Z jasna vizijo in dolgoročnim načrtovanjem

options.en: Maximizing product value through Product Goal and ordering
Managing Developer assignments

why.en: The PO's core accountability is value maximization. Specifications and estimates serve that end but aren't the PO's core job.
why.sl: Product Owner prispeva k trajnosti z jasna vizijo in dolgoročnim načrtovanjem. To je ključno.

q.en: Product Backlog items near the top should be more granular and better understood than items further down.
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Refinement progressively decomposes and clarifies items as they move up in order. Items far down can be coarse; items near the top must be actionable soon.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti za podjetja vseh velikosti. Vloga je enaka.

q.en: A Product Owner realizes a Product Backlog item is no longer needed. They should:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Product Ownerja pri tveganju?

options.en: Complete it to avoid wasted work
Remove it or deprioritize it — obsolete items reduce transparency
Ask the Scrum Master to decide
options.sl: Biti mora aktivna pri identifikaciji in upravljanju poslovnih tveganj

options.en: Leave it for historical record

why.en: Transparency of the Product Backlog matters. Obsolete items clutter ordering and mislead inspection. Remove or deprioritize them explicitly.
why.sl: Product Owner mora biti aktivna pri identifikaciji in upravljanju poslovnih tveganj. To je del njene vloge.

q.en: 'Unrealized Value' in Evidence-Based Management refers to:
q.sl: Kako Product Owner zagotavlja transparentnost?

options.en: Sunk costs in the project
Potential future value if the product met all customer needs
Value lost to competitors
Value measured only in revenue

why.en: Unrealized Value (UV) is the opportunity — how much additional value could be created if the product better met customer needs. It informs investment decisions.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja transparentnost z jasna komunikacijo in dostopnostjo. To je temelj zaupanja.

q.en: 'Ability to Innovate' in Evidence-Based Management measures:
q.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti:

options.en: Number of patents filed
Effectiveness at delivering new capabilities to meet customer needs
R&D budget size
Time in brainstorming

why.en: Ability to Innovate (A2I) captures how effectively an organization can deliver new capabilities. High technical debt, for example, degrades A2I.
why.sl: Product Owner je trebala biti aktivna, dostopna in odgovorna. To so ključne lastnosti vloge.

q.en: A Product Owner must choose between a high-cost feature with uncertain payoff and a low-cost experiment to test the demand. The better empirical approach is:
q.sl: Kaj je ključni cilj Product Ownerja v Scrumu?

options.en: Commit to the big feature to be decisive
Run the cheap experiment first to reduce uncertainty, then decide based on evidence
Split the Sprint evenly across both
Defer the decision to the Developers

why.en: Under uncertainty, small experiments that reduce the unknowns usually dominate large speculative commitments. This is empirical value management.
why.sl: Ključni cilj Product Ownerja je maksimirati vrednost izdelka. To je osrednja vloga in odgovornost.

q.en: A Scrum Team is struggling to understand the business rationale behind product decisions. This suggests the Product Owner may not be adequately:
q.sl: Scrum tim se trudi razumeti poslovno utemeljitev za prioritete svojega Produktnega seznama. Kaj bi naj počel Product Owner, da bi jim pomagal razumeti vrednost?

options.en: Working faster than the Developers
Communicating the Product Goal and ordering rationale
options.sl: Sporočanje Cilja izdelka in urejenosti seznama

options.en: Attending all Daily Scrums
Writing the Definition of Done

why.en: One core PO accountability is explicitly communicating the Product Goal and the value driving ordering decisions. Without this transparency, the team cannot collaborate effectively on what matters most.
why.sl: Product Owner komunicira Cilj izdelka in urejenost. To pomaga Razvijalcem razumeti vrednost in prioritete. Druge možnosti niso odgovornost PO za razumevanje vrednosti.

q.en: Who ultimately decides whether the organization respects the Product Owner's decisions?
q.sl: Kaj je primarni namen Pregleda Sprinta?

options.en: The Product Owner
The Scrum Master
options.sl: Pregledati in sprejeti ali zavrniti končano delo

options.en: The entire organization
options.sl: Pregledati napredek v primerjavi s ciljem Sprinta

options.en: Stakeholders alone

why.en: The Scrum Guide 2020 states that for the PO to succeed, the entire organization must respect their decisions. Without this organizational backing, even good decisions are undermined.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta je namenjen pregledavanju inkrementov in prilagoditvi pristopa. To vključuje sprejemanje ali zavračanje končanega dela in zbiranje povratnih informacij.

q.en: A Product Owner can ask a Scrum Master to help them order the Product Backlog in exchange for assistance, but the PO remains accountable for the final order.
q.sl: Kaj bi Scrum Master storiti, če je Razvijalec nenehno preusmerjavan s strani deležnikov?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The PO may delegate tasks to anyone, including the Scrum Master. However, the accountability for ordering and the value decisions it represents stays with the PO.
why.sl: Scrum Master je odgovoren za odstranjevanje ovir in zaščito Scrum tima. Omogoči osredotočenost na delo Sprinta in odstrani preusmeritve.

q.en: A Product Owner does not have technical expertise in the domain the Developers work in. What is the impact on their ability to order the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kaj pomeni, da je Scrum tim "samoupravljajoč"?

options.en: They cannot order it — they must ask the Developers to order instead
options.sl: Razvijalci si izbirajo, katere Scrume sploh uporabljati

options.en: They can order based on value, market feedback, and strategic goals even without deep technical knowledge
options.sl: Razvijalci se sami odločijo, kako delo opraviti, da dosežejo cilj Sprinta

options.en: They should avoid ordering and focus only on writing requirements
options.sl: Product Owner ne potrebuje biti prisoten med Sprintom

options.en: They need to hire a technical consultant to order for them
options.sl: Ne potrebuje se noben Scrum Master

why.en: The PO's accountability is value and strategy, not technical implementation. They can order the backlog based on what maximizes value, with Developers providing technical trade-off input.
why.sl: Samoupravljajoč tim se sam odloči, kako delo opraviti in ga organizira. To ne pomeni izbire Scruma kot procesa, niti da vloge niso potrebne.

q.en: A executive stakeholder insists that a low-value item be added to the top of the Product Backlog. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Med Sprintom se pojavi nepopravljiva tehnična težava v obstoječem kodu. Kaj bi moral Scrum Master storiti?

options.en: Agree immediately to keep the executive happy
options.sl: Naročiti Razvijalcem, da prekličejo to nalogo

options.en: Refuse and remove the executive from future decisions
Acknowledge the input but order based on value, and explain the reasoning to the executive
options.sl: Pomočati Scrum timu, da preusmeri delo in ponovno oceni cilj Sprinta

options.en: Ask the Developers to override the decision

why.en: The PO is accountable for maximizing value. While stakeholder input is valuable, the ordering decision belongs to the PO. Transparency about the rationale builds trust even in disagreement.
why.sl: Scrum Master pomaga timu nagovoriti nepričakovane situacije. Če obstaja vprašanje o cilju Sprinta, ga je treba ponovno premisliti in prilagoditi delo.

q.en: Which characteristic is essential for a Product Owner to succeed in a distributed or remote team?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše, da Product Owner naredi pri pripravi Produktnega seznama na Načrtovanje Sprinta?

options.en: Ability to work independently without any developer contact
options.sl: Zagotoviti popolne navedke in ocene veljavnosti

options.en: Consistent, transparent communication of goals and decisions across time zones and channels
options.sl: Zagotoviti, da je seznam uskladen s Ciljem izdelka in primerno uređen

options.en: Writing extremely detailed specifications to avoid questions
options.sl: Pisati vse navedke z enim stavkom

options.en: Delegating all communication to the Scrum Master

why.en: In distributed settings, the PO's explicit communication becomes even more critical. Without synchronous access, clarity and transparency in writing and asynchronous channels are essential.
why.sl: Product Owner zagotavlja, da je Produktni seznam jasen, uređen (prioritiziran) in uskladen s Ciljem izdelka. To je bistvenega pomena za uspešno Načrtovanje.

q.en: The Product Owner is accountable for the Developers' velocity and their ability to forecast accurately.
q.sl: Kaj je kritičnega pomena za Razvijalce, da razumejo med Načrtovanjem Sprinta?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Developers are accountable for estimation and forecasting what they can accomplish. The PO is accountable for ordering and value, not for the Developers' capacity metrics.
why.sl: Razvijalci morajo razumeti cilj Sprinta in Definicijo Končanega. To vodiči njihovo delo in samoupravičijo njihove odločitve.

q.en: A Product Owner discovers that stakeholders have been working directly with Developers to add items to the Sprint Backlog, bypassing the Product Backlog. The PO should:
q.sl: Kaj je glavna prednost empiričnega pristopa v Scrum-u?

options.en: Allow it if the items are valuable
Report this to the Scrum Master and restore the Product Backlog as the single source of work
options.sl: Omogoča timu, da se sučasno nauči in prilagodi na podlagi resničnih podatkov

options.en: Let the Developers decide what to do
Escalate to management without involving the Scrum Team

why.en: The Product Backlog is the single authoritative source of work. Bypassing the PO and the Product Backlog violates transparency and the PO's accountability for what gets built and in what order.
why.sl: Empiričnost pomeni, da se odločitvi naslanjamo na izkušnjo in opazovanje, ne na špekulacije. Scrum tim se nauči in se prilagodi na podlagi resničnih rezultatov.

q.en: What is the relationship between the Product Owner's accountability and the Product Backlog's transparency?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi z nezavršenim delom na koncu Sprinta?

options.en: They are unrelated
The PO is accountable for ensuring the Product Backlog is transparent so the team can inspect and adapt effectively
options.sl: Gre nazaj v Produktni seznam za ponovno ocenjevanje

options.en: Transparency reduces the PO's accountability
options.sl: Je izgubljeno in ga je treba znova napisati

options.en: Only Developers need to see the Product Backlog
options.sl: Mora biti dokončano do konca tega tedna

why.en: Transparency is a pillar of empiricism. The PO's accountability includes making the backlog visible so the Scrum Team and stakeholders can inspect and collaborate.
why.sl: Nezavršeno delo se vrne v Produktni seznam kot del inkrementalne dostave. Ponovno se ga oceni in prioritizira za naslednje Sprinte.

q.en: A Product Owner spends most of their time in technical design meetings with Developers. What is a likely risk?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejša odgovornost Product Ownerja glede vrednosti?

options.en: The team will move faster
options.sl: Odločiti se, kako hitro bodo Razvijalci delali

options.en: Stakeholders and customer feedback are neglected; the PO is not focused enough on value and market feedback
options.sl: Maksimalizirati vrednost Produktnega inkrementov, ki jih dostavi Scrum tim

options.en: The Scrum Master will complain
options.sl: Kupiti najboljšo programsko opremo za Razvijalce

options.en: Nothing — this is a sign of strong collaboration

why.en: The PO's primary accountability is maximizing value by understanding stakeholders, market, and strategy. Spending excessive time in technical design may be a drift away from these core responsibilities.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za maksimaliziranje vrednosti Inkrementov. To je temeljna odgovornost vloge, kot je opredeljeno v Scrum Vodiču.

q.en: When conflicts arise between different stakeholders, the Product Owner should primarily consider:
q.sl: Kaj je primarni namen Retrospektive Sprinta?

options.en: Which stakeholder has the most seniority
Which option maximizes product value and aligns with the Product Goal
options.sl: Odkriti, kaj je šlo dobro, kaj slabo in kako se izboljšati

options.en: Splitting the work evenly between both stakeholder requests
Deferring the decision to the Developers
options.sl: Odločiti, kaj bo v naslednjem Sprintu

why.en: The PO is accountable for maximizing value, not for keeping all stakeholders equally happy. Value and strategic alignment guide ordering, not seniority or politics.
why.sl: Retrospektiva Sprinta je možnost za tim, da si ogleda svoj proces in se nauči izboljšanja. Fokus je na procesnih izboljšavah, ne na osebnih ocenah.

q.en: A Product Owner is asked by their manager to ensure a specific technical tool is adopted by the Developers. The PO should:
q.sl: Kaj je Cilj produkta v Scrum-u?

options.en: Mandate the tool in the Product Backlog
options.sl: Kaj se dogaja v naslednjem Sprintu

options.en: Understand the business value the tool creates and order items accordingly; technical decisions belong to the Developers
options.sl: Dolgoročna vizija, ki vodi razvoj produkta

options.en: Avoid the decision and let the Developers choose
Delegate the decision to the Scrum Master

why.en: The PO understands value and strategy. If a tool creates business value, the PO orders backlog items accordingly. But the technical decision to adopt it rests with the Developers, not the PO.
why.sl: Cilj produkta je dolgoročna vizija, ki vodi ali pripravljanje Produktnega seznama. Različno je od cilja Sprinta in služi kot kompas za razvoj.

q.en: Which statement best reflects the Product Owner's relationship with the Definition of Done?
q.sl: Kako Product Owner najbolje komunicira vrednost stvari na Produktnem seznamu?

options.en: The PO writes the Definition of Done
The PO and the Scrum Team collaborate to ensure the Definition of Done supports value and transparency
options.sl: Z jasnim razloženjem, kako vsaka reč prinaša vrednost

options.en: The PO must follow the Definition of Done even if it slows releases
The PO changes the Definition of Done to meet release deadlines

why.en: While Developers and Scrum Master may lead Definition of Done discussions, the PO is part of the team and cares because it impacts the product's quality and long-term value.
why.sl: Product Owner mora jasno sporočiti vrednost in prioritete. To pomaga Razvijalcem razumeti, zakaj jo morajo narediti in kako se osredotočiti na najpomembnejše delo.

q.en: A Product Backlog item has conflicting acceptance criteria from two different stakeholders. Who is accountable for resolving this?
q.sl: Kaj je pogostost Dnevnega Scruma?

options.en: The Scrum Master
The Developers
The Product Owner
The stakeholders must resolve it themselves

why.en: The PO is accountable for the Product Backlog, including clarity and coherence of items. When stakeholder input conflicts, the PO resolves it by making a value-based decision.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je dogodek, ki se zgodi vsak delovni dan Sprinta. Ima časovni okvir do 15 minut.

q.en: What does it mean for a Product Backlog item to be 'transparent'?
q.sl: Kaj je odgovornost Razvijalcev pri Dnevnem Scrumu?

options.en: It uses fancy formatting
It is written clearly enough that the Scrum Team can understand what it asks for and why it matters
It includes every possible detail
options.sl: Organizacija lastnega dela za dosego cilja Sprinta

options.en: It has been translated to multiple languages

why.en: Transparency means clarity about what the item does and why. Excessive detail is not transparency; shared understanding is.
why.sl: Razvijalci se pri Dnevnem Scrumu osredotočijo na kako bodo skupaj delali, da dosežejo cilj Sprinta. To je samoupravičena koordinacijska prireditev, ne poročanje.

q.en: Product Backlog refinement should happen only if there is a formal 'refinement event' scheduled.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše za Scrum Mastera, da uradi v prvem tednu s Scrum timom?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Refinement is ongoing throughout the Sprint — in hallway conversations, reviews, pairing sessions, etc. While a time-boxed session can help, refinement is not a single formal event.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach. V prvem tednu je ključno, da predstavi Scrum okvir in pogoje za uspeh, ter spodbudi razumevanje.

q.en: A Product Backlog item is vaguely described: 'Improve user experience.' The Developers push back during Sprint Planning. What should happen next?
q.sl: Kaj je najslabši razlog, da Scrum tim ne dosega svojega cilja Sprinta?

options.en: Select the item anyway; Developers can figure it out
options.sl: Nezadostni viri ali trenutno nepredvidene ovire

options.en: The Product Owner and Developers collaborate to refine it into smaller, clearer items before selecting it
Remove the item from the backlog permanently
The Scrum Master assigns the item to an individual Developer

why.en: This is the essence of refinement. When an item lacks clarity, the team works together to break it down and clarify it before selection. The PO leads, but refinement is collaborative.
why.sl: Čeprav je lahko nezadostnih virov razlog, je to redko samo razlog. Pravi razlogi so pogosto nepredvideni dogodki in ovire. Druge možnosti ne bistveno vplivajo na dosego.

q.en: How should the Product Owner decide whether to add a Product Backlog item suggested by a stakeholder?
q.sl: Kaj pomeni, da je Inkreement "Končan"?

options.en: Add everything stakeholders suggest
options.sl: Ko je razvoj zaključen, vendar testiranje ostane

options.en: Reject everything that isn't from the Product Owner
Evaluate whether the item aligns with the Product Goal and delivers value relative to other items
Ask the Developers to vote

why.en: Anyone can suggest items, but the PO decides what enters the backlog. The decision is based on value and alignment with the Product Goal, not on who suggested it.
why.sl: Inkreement je Končan le, če izpolnjuje Definicijo Končanega. To je objektivna priporočila, ne subjektivna odobritev.

q.en: A Product Backlog item is estimated at 40 story points, far larger than most items. What is the most appropriate action?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Scrum Masterja do Scrum tima?

options.en: Select it into a Sprint anyway
Delete the item because it is too large
options.sl: Coach, ki spodbuja samoorganizirano in Cross-Functional skupino

options.en: The Product Owner and Developers should collaborate to split it into smaller items before selection
Increase the Sprint length to accommodate it

why.en: Large items reduce transparency and limit flexibility. Splitting makes the work clearer, testable, and deliverable more incrementally. This is a core refinement practice.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach in facilitator. Njihova vloga je olajšati samoupravničeni razvoj in odstraniti ovire, ne pa dajati ukazov.

q.en: Two Product Backlog items deliver the same business outcome but with different risks. How should the Product Owner order them?
q.sl: Kaj je skupna napaka pri voditvi Retrospektive Sprinta?

options.en: Randomly
By effort (smallest first)
Based on value, risk, and learning — choosing the approach that best achieves the Product Goal
options.sl: Poudarjanje osebnih ovir namesto procesnih izboljšav

options.en: Alphabetically

why.en: Ordering is not mechanical. The PO weighs multiple factors: value, risk, learning opportunity, and dependencies. The choice depends on what best moves toward the Product Goal.
why.sl: Retrospektiva mora biti varno mesto za razgovor o procesih. Navadno je napaka fokusirati se na osebne kritike ali zanemariti pozitivne točke.

q.en: What is the primary purpose of ordering the Product Backlog?
q.sl: Kaj je bistvene vloge Product Ownerja med Sprintom?

options.en: To organize work by complexity
To maximize value delivered by the Scrum Team over time
options.sl: Dostopnost za vprašanja in jasnost navedkov

options.en: To reduce the number of items
To satisfy stakeholder preferences

why.en: Ordering guides the Scrum Team's work toward maximum value. It reflects the PO's best judgment about what to build next given current knowledge and strategy.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za razpoložljivost in razjasnjuje navedke, ko so potrebna. To zagotavlja, da Razvijalci lahko delajo brez blokad.

q.en: A Scrum Team discovers during refinement that two items in the backlog address the same user need. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kaj je Inkreement v Scrum-u?

options.en: Keep both to give stakeholders choices
Consolidate them into one clearer item and reorder as needed
options.sl: Vsota vseh končanega produktnega dela do sedaj, ki je Končana in potencialno učinkuje

options.en: Ask the Scrum Master to decide
Leave them as-is for the team to handle during Sprint Planning

why.en: Duplicate or overlapping items reduce clarity. The PO consolidates and reorders to keep the backlog lean, transparent, and focused.
why.sl: Inkreement je skupno delo vseh Sprintov do sedaj, ki je Končano in potencialno učinkuje. To je grajeno, oprijemljivo stvar, ne pa seznam.

q.en: Product Backlog items selected for the next Sprint should be more refined than items further down.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše za Product Ownerja, da počne pri ureditvi Produktnega seznama?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Items moving toward selection must be clear and ready to work on. Items far down the backlog can be coarser; refinement moves items from rough to ready.
why.sl: Uređenost Produktnega seznama je ključna odgovornost Product Ownerja. Prioritete se temeljijo na vrednosti in strateški viziji, ne pa na drugih dejavnikih.

q.en: During Product Backlog refinement, a Developer discovers that an item depends on infrastructure work that hasn't been started. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Razvijalcev pri Načrtovanju Sprinta?

options.en: Select the item anyway and deal with the dependency later
Ask the Developers to do the infrastructure work first, without a backlog item
options.sl: Oceniti, kaj bi moglo biti opravljeno v Sprintu in kako ga opraviti

options.en: Work with the Scrum Team to surface the dependency, add it to the backlog if it's not already there, and reorder accordingly
Tell the Developer it's their problem to solve

why.en: Dependencies are ordering factors. If an item depends on unseen work, the PO works with the team to make dependencies explicit and handle them in the backlog.
why.sl: Razvijalci igrajo bistveno vlogo z ocenjevanjem dela in dogovorom o tem, kaj je mogoče narediti. To ruški, da je cilj Sprinta dosegljiv in realen.

q.en: What is a key indicator that Product Backlog refinement is happening effectively?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Product Owner ni dostopen med Sprintom?

options.en: Every item has 100+ story points
options.sl: Razvijalci morajo počakati, da se vrne

options.en: Items near the top are clear, sized, and understood; Sprint Planning moves quickly
options.sl: Razvijalci morajo sami odločati o razpoložljivih stvareh

options.en: Refinement happens in a single formal meeting per Sprint
options.sl: Scrum Master mora prevzeti vlogo Product Ownerja

options.en: The Product Owner writes every item in advance

why.en: Effective refinement means the team can start Sprint Planning with confidence that top items are actionable. This shows ongoing collaboration and clarity.
why.sl: Product Owner bi moral biti dostopen. Če ni, je to blokada. Razvijalci ne bi smeli čakati; potrebna je rešitev, da se prepreči blokada.

q.en: A Product Owner wants to add an item to the Product Backlog that is purely technical debt cleanup with no direct customer value. The item should:
q.sl: Kaj je skupna napaka pri ocenjevanju dela v Scrum-u?

options.en: Be rejected because it has no customer value
options.sl: Oceniti v minutah, ne v točkah

options.en: Be added and ordered based on how it enables future value and supports the Product Goal
Be assigned to Developers to do in their 'free time'
options.sl: Oceniti samo Razvijalci brez vhodov Product Ownerja

options.en: Be hidden from stakeholders

why.en: Technical debt that blocks value delivery should be in the backlog and ordered. The PO recognizes that some items enable future value even if they don't directly deliver it today.
why.sl: Ocena je skupni proces. Razvijalci zagotovijo stroške, Product Owner pa vrednost. Ocenjevanje posameznikov je tudi protismerno samoupravljanju.

q.en: How does the Product Owner use the Product Backlog as a communication tool?
q.sl: Kaj je cilj Načrtovanja Sprinta?

options.en: As a list of demands for the Developers
options.sl: Narediti seznam vse stvari, ki bi moglo biti storjena

options.en: As a visible artifact that shows stakeholders and the team what will be worked on, in what order, and why
options.sl: Vzpostaviti cilj Sprinta in dogovoriti se, kaj bo to dosegljivo

options.en: As a tool to assign work to individual Developers
As a compliance checklist

why.en: The Product Backlog is transparent and ordered by the PO. This transparency communicates priorities and strategy to everyone — team and stakeholders alike.
why.sl: Načrtovanje Sprinta ima za cilj ustvariti cilj Sprinta in dogovoriti se o tem, kaj bi moglo biti naredljivo za dosego tega cilja.

q.en: A Product Owner regularly reorders the backlog during the Sprint without discussing it with the Developers. What risk does this create?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše delo Scrum Masterja s Product Ownerjem?

options.en: The Developers will move faster
Developers may waste effort on items that are no longer priorities; trust and predictability erode
options.sl: Pomagati Product Ownerju, da razume Scrum okvir in načela

options.en: Nothing — the PO has authority to order
The Scrum Master will be upset

why.en: While the PO has authority, excessive mid-Sprint reordering without discussion can disrupt team focus. Transparency and collaboration on why ordering changes are necessary.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach za Product Ownerja. Pomaga mu razumeti svoje vloge in odgovornosti ter kako delati z Razvijalci.

q.en: What is the relationship between Product Backlog refinement and the Sprint Goal?
q.sl: Kaj je izjava Definicije Končanega?

options.en: They are unrelated
options.sl: Kaj Razvijalci naredijo na koncu dneva

options.en: Refinement of items before Sprint Planning helps the team craft a meaningful Sprint Goal
options.sl: Skupna seznam, ki jo mora izpolniti inkreement, da je sprejemljiv

options.en: The Sprint Goal determines all refinement
options.sl: Kako se vsi Razvijalci počutijo ob koncu Sprinta

options.en: Refinement only happens after the Sprint Goal is set
options.sl: Pravila, ki jih Product Owner daje

why.en: Clear, refined items at the top of the backlog give the team better material from which to craft a Sprint Goal. Refinement and Sprint planning work together.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je skupna seznama standardov, ki jih mora vsak inkreement izpolniti. To je skupen dogovor, ne pa Product Owner prevesti.

q.en: A Product Backlog item is: 'As a user, I want the dashboard to be faster.' This item is too vague. What is the most important refinement step?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši rezultat Dnevnega Scruma?

options.en: Add acceptance criteria with specific performance targets (e.g., page load under 2s)
Assign it to the fastest Developer
options.sl: Načrt za ostanek dneva, da se dosege cilj Sprinta

options.en: Split it into 10 smaller items immediately
Have the Scrum Master estimate it

why.en: Clarity comes first. Acceptance criteria that define what 'faster' means let the Developers understand the ask and allow the PO to know when it's done.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je za samoupravičevanje in planiranje dneva. Cilj je da tim skupaj razume, kako napreduje k cilju Sprinta.

q.en: The Product Goal is best described as:
q.sl: Kaj je naloga Scrum Masterja, če Razvijalec nasprotuje cilju Sprinta?

options.en: A list of features to build in the current Sprint
A long-term commitment that guides the Scrum Team's direction and work over time
A detailed project plan
options.sl: Olajšati razgovor med Razvijalcem in Product Ownerjem, da se razume in poujema

options.en: A technical architecture decision

why.en: The Product Goal is the overarching objective — the future state of the product the Scrum Team is working toward. It is long-term, not Sprint-scoped.
why.sl: Scrum Master je facilitator. Pomagati mora pri razgovoru in zagotoviti, da je cilj Sprinta razumljiv in dogovorjen.

q.en: When should the Product Owner review and possibly revise the Product Goal?
q.sl: Kaj je koncept "kontinuiranega izboljšanja" v Scrum-u?

options.en: Never — once set, the Product Goal must remain immutable for the team's commitment
Continuously, as evidence emerges about whether the Goal still serves customer and market reality
options.sl: Osredotočiti se samo na tehnične izboljšave

options.en: Only at fiscal year-end as part of the formal organizational planning cycle
options.sl: Redni pregledi in prilagoditve procesov in praks

options.en: Only when the Developers explicitly raise concerns about feasibility or value

why.en: The Product Goal guides long-term direction, but it is not sacred. When market evidence or learning shows the Goal is no longer valid, the PO inspects and adapts.
why.sl: Kontinuirana izboljšanja je jedro Scrum-a. Skozi Retrospektivo in prilagoditve, se tim nenehno učijo in izboljšajo.

q.en: A Scrum Team has nearly achieved its current Product Goal. What should happen next?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši razlog, da Scrum tim potrebuje Scrum Mastera?

options.en: Keep working toward it forever
Set a new Product Goal that reflects the team's learning and evolving market needs
options.sl: Da olajša Scrum proces in pomaga timu biti samoupravljajoč

options.en: Dissolve the Scrum Team
Hand off the product to another team

why.en: A Product Goal is achieved or becomes obsolete; it is not permanent. The PO and team define a new Goal that reflects progress and new priorities.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach, ki pomaga timu razumeti in uporabljati Scrum. Niso vodja s pogoji, temveč facilitator.

q.en: How explicit should the Product Goal be communicated?
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Scrum tim ne more doseči svojega cilja Sprinta med razvoj?

options.en: Only to executives, not the team
Implicitly — developers should infer it from work
options.sl: Product Owner mora spremeniti Produktni seznam

options.en: Very explicitly — in clear language that the entire team and stakeholders can understand
options.sl: Scrum Master in tim pregledajo razloge in prilagodijo prihodnje Sprinte

options.en: Only in technical documentation

why.en: The PO is accountable for explicitly communicating the Product Goal. Without clarity, the team cannot align their work or make good trade-off decisions.
why.sl: Če cilj Sprinta ni dosegljiv, je to povratna informacija. Tim se nauči razlogov in prilagodi svoje pristope za naslednje Sprinte.

q.en: The Product Goal should change every Sprint.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše značenje "preglednosti" v Scrum-u?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Product Goal is long-term and stable. Sprint Goals change; the Product Goal typically remains consistent until it is achieved or becomes obsolete.
why.sl: Preglednost v Scrum-u pomeni, da so ključni aspekti (Produktni seznam, cilj Sprinta, Inkreement) jasni vsem. To omogoči dobro odločitve.

q.en: What is the relationship between the Product Goal and the definition of Done?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga deležnikov v Scrum-u?

options.en: They are unrelated; commitments and goals operate on entirely different artifacts
The Product Goal commits the Product Backlog; the Definition of Done commits the quality of each Increment
options.sl: Zagotavljati povratne informacije na Pregledu Sprinta

options.en: The Definition of Done replaces the Product Goal once the Goal is achieved
The Product Goal lives inside the Definition of Done as a quality criterion

why.en: Both are commitments, but at different scopes. The Product Goal guides long-term direction; the DoD ensures each Increment is truly 'Done' and maintains quality.
why.sl: Deležniki so povabljeni na Pregled Sprinta, da dajejo povratne informacije in vidijo delo. Niso del Scrum tima, imajo pa vlogo v povratnih informacijah.

q.en: If the Product Goal is to 'Build the best e-commerce platform in the market', what would make this Product Goal more effective?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši izhodna točka Pregleda Sprinta?

options.en: Make the wording vaguer to give the team more interpretive freedom in execution
Specify measurable outcomes — e.g., 'achieve X% retention and Y% market share by Q4'
options.sl: Preusmerjene stvari in povratne informacije za Produktni seznam

options.en: Remove the Product Goal and rely on Sprint Goals to direct the work each Sprint
Add more technical detail and specifications about the platform architecture

why.en: Clearer goals with measurable outcomes help the team and stakeholders know whether the Goal is being achieved. Vague goals obscure progress.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta je namenjena zberu povratnih informacij in prilagoditi Produktni seznam. To je povratna kroga, ki vodi prihodnje razvoje.

q.en: A Scrum Team is working toward a Product Goal, but halfway through a Sprint, market conditions change dramatically. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši del navedka za Razvijalce?

options.en: Keep the Product Goal unchanged to demonstrate commitment to long-term direction
Immediately cancel the Sprint and restart with a clean slate next Sprint
options.sl: Jasni kriteriji sprejemanja, ki jih razumejo Razvijalci

options.en: Inspect whether the Goal is still valid; if not, replace it with one reflecting the new reality
options.sl: Podatke o tem, kdo je napisal navedek

options.en: Delegate the Goal decision to the Developers, since they own day-to-day work
