why.en: Empiricism applies to the Product Goal too. The PO inspects evidence and adapts. Clinging to an invalid Goal violates transparency and adaptation.
why.sl: Razvijalci morajo jasno razumeti kaj je treba storiti (kriterije sprejemanja). To je bistveno za popolnjene delo.

q.en: During a Sprint Review, a stakeholder says the completed Increment does not meet their expectations. What is the appropriate response?
q.sl: Kaj je bistvena karakteristika samoupravljajočega Scrum tima?

options.en: Conclude the Developers failed to deliver and assign blame for the missed expectations
Inspect what was built, discuss the gap, and adapt the Product Backlog as the feedback warrants
Demand the Developers redo the work to match the stakeholder's original expectations exactly
options.sl: Sami odločajo, kako delo opraviti in ga organizirati

options.en: Cancel the next Sprint until the team better understands stakeholder requirements

why.en: Sprint Review is a working session for inspection and adaptation. Feedback is a gift — it reveals misalignment between expectations and what was built, which informs the next steps.
why.sl: Samoupravljajoč tim sam odloči kako delo opraviti. To ne pomeni, da ni vloge ali vodstva, temveč, da je tim vključen v odločitve.

q.en: Who should attend a Sprint Review, and what is their role?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše za Product Ownerja pri komuniciranju s Razvijalci?

options.en: Only the Developers; stakeholders are not invited
Only the Product Owner and Scrum Master; they report back
options.sl: Jasno razjasniti vrednost in prednosti stvari

options.en: The Scrum Team and stakeholders; they collaborate on the Increment and next steps
The entire company in a formal presentation

why.en: Sprint Review is collaborative. The Scrum Team and invited stakeholders inspect the Increment together and discuss what to do next. It is a working session, not a presentation.
why.sl: Product Owner mora jasno sporočiti kaj in zakaj. To pomaga Razvijalcem razumeti vrednost in biti motivirani.

q.en: The Sprint Review is best described as:
q.sl: Kaj je skupna napaka pri načrtovanju Sprinta?

options.en: A final acceptance meeting where stakeholders approve work before release
A working session where the Scrum Team and stakeholders inspect the Increment and adapt the Product Backlog
An opportunity for the Scrum Master to report progress to management
options.sl: Planiranje premalo ali preveč dela, vendar ne prilagajanje cilju Sprinta

options.en: A time-boxed meeting to collect stakeholder requests for the next Sprint

why.en: The Sprint Review is a collaborative working session, not a sign-off or approval meeting. The Scrum Team and stakeholders together inspect the Increment and update the Product Backlog based on new information.
why.sl: Pogosta napaka je planiranje premalo (Razvijalci so podcenjeni) ali preveč (cilj je nerealen). Dobar Načrt je vožljiv in dosegljiv.

q.en: The Scrum Team should invite stakeholders to the Daily Scrum.
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Razvijalcev pri zagotavljanju kakovosti?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. The Daily Scrum is a Developers' event. The Product Owner and Scrum Master only attend if they are actively working as Developers on Sprint Backlog items. Stakeholders are not invited to the Daily Scrum.
why.sl: Razvijalci so odgovorni za kakovost svojega dela. Definicija Končanega vključuje standarde kakovosti, ki jih morajo dosegti.

q.en: During the first part of Sprint Planning, the Product Owner proposes:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejša prednost rabe Scrum-a v primerjavi z drugim pristopom?

options.en: A technical architecture for the Sprint
How the product could increase its value during the Sprint
options.sl: Zmožnost prilagajanja na spremembe in nudenja vrednosti pogosto

options.en: Which Developers will work on which items
A schedule for Daily Scrum meetings

why.en: In Sprint Planning Topic One, the Product Owner proposes how the product could increase its value in the current Sprint. This becomes the foundation for crafting the Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Scrum omogoča ekipam hitro prilagajati in dostaviti vrednost redno. To je ključna prednost v negotovem okolju.

q.en: A sprint appears to be drifting away from its Sprint Goal mid-way through. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kaj je Produktni seznam na začetku razvoja?

options.en: Cancel the Sprint immediately to start fresh with a more realistic Sprint Goal
Meet with the Developers to inspect whether the Sprint Goal is still achievable, and adapt scope
options.sl: Polna list vseh stvari, ki bi moglo biti naredljivo

options.en: Add more items to the Sprint Backlog so the team can compensate for lost time
options.sl: Živa lista stvari, ki jih je treba narediti, preusmerjene glede na vrednost

options.en: Stay silent and observe; the Developers will work it out by themselves eventually
options.sl: Fiksna lista, ki se ne spremeni

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for the Product Backlog and Product Goal. If the Sprint Goal is at risk, the PO collaborates with Developers to inspect the situation and adapt (by adjusting scope, clarifying Goal, or identifying blockers).
why.sl: Produktni seznam začne z ideami in prioritetami. Živa je lista, ki se postavi prilagajanja, popravilne in spremembe med razvojem.

q.en: Which of the following are outcomes of the Sprint Retrospective? (Select all that apply)
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši korak v Retrospektivi Sprinta?

options.en: The team identifies improvements to their process and tools
options.sl: Tim prepozna izboljšave svojega procesa in orodij

options.en: The team commits to experiments or actions for the next Sprint
options.sl: Tim se zavezuje poskusom ali dejavnostim za naslednji Sprint

options.en: Stakeholders provide feedback on the product
options.sl: Deležniki podajo povratne informacije o izdelku

options.en: The Definition of Done may be updated
Product Backlog items are estimated

why.en: The Retrospective focuses on process and team improvements — how people interact, what tools help, and whether the Definition of Done is adequate. Stakeholder feedback and backlog estimation happen elsewhere.
why.sl: Retrospektiva je namenjena učenju in izboljšanju. Fokus je na procesnih izboljšavah in pravednih razgovorih o tem, kaj je dobro in kaj ne.

q.en: The Product Owner has not attended several Sprint Reviews. Which of the following is most likely true?
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Scrum Masterja pri rešavanju konfliktov v timu?

options.en: The Scrum Team is functioning effectively without the Product Owner's input
The Product Owner is wisely avoiding direct conflict with difficult stakeholders
options.sl: Olajšati razgovor in pomagati timu rešiti konflikt

options.en: Stakeholders cannot properly inspect the Increment or adapt the Product Backlog without the PO
The Scrum Master should formally take over the Product Owner's accountabilities

why.en: The Product Owner's role in the Sprint Review is central — explaining the work, discussing the Increment, and facilitating Product Backlog adaptation. Without the PO, the Review loses critical context and decision-making authority.
why.sl: Scrum Master je facilitator. Pomaga timu komunicirati in reševati konflikte na zdrav način, ne pa njihova naročila.

q.en: During Sprint Planning, if the Developers believe they cannot achieve the proposed Sprint Goal with the selected items, they should:
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Razvijalci ne strinjajo s prioritetami Product Ownerja?

options.en: Proceed and work overtime to meet the Goal
Discuss the concerns with the Product Owner and collaboratively adjust scope or Goal to ensure a realistic commitment
Cancel the Sprint
options.sl: Razgovor in razumevanje vrednosti je potrebna

options.en: Work silently and report failure at the Sprint Review

why.en: Scrum values transparency and collaboration. The Developers must voice concerns about feasibility; the Scrum Team (including the PO) then adapts to craft a realistic, achievable Sprint Goal.
why.sl: Razgovor je ključen. Razvijalci bi morali razumeti vrednost prioritet. Če obstajajo tehnični izzivi, je tudi treba jih objaviti.

q.en: An Increment meets the Definition of Done on day two of a two-week Sprint. When should it be released?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši podatek za Scrum Mastera, da zbira med Sprintom?

options.en: Only at the end of the Sprint
Only after the Sprint Review
options.sl: Kaj je prikazujem in kaj blokira cilj Sprinta

options.en: The Product Owner decides, weighing value, risk, and feedback timing — it could be released immediately
options.sl: Kako je bila vsaka oseba produktivna

options.en: After all items in the Sprint are complete

why.en: An Increment can be released any time it meets the Definition of Done. Releasing earlier increases learning and delivers value sooner. The Product Owner makes this decision.
why.sl: Scrum Master se osredotoči na napredek in blokade. Pomaga timu razumeti kaj je na pravi poti in kaj nega izzive.

q.en: Multiple Increments can be created and released within a single Sprint.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejša akcija, ki je Product Owner lahko sprejem za povečanje vrednosti?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. An Increment is a stepping stone toward the Product Goal. Multiple Increments may be created within a Sprint, and each can be released independently once it meets the Definition of Done.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za maksimaliziranje vrednosti. To počne skozi prioritizacijo. Vrednost je odločujoča, ne hitrost.

q.en: The Definition of Done is best understood as:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Pregleda Sprinta?

options.en: A checklist the Product Owner uses to accept completed work
A shared understanding of what it means for work to be 'complete' and potentially releasable
options.sl: Inkreement se prikaže in se zbere povratne informacije

options.en: A list of testing procedures the QA team must perform
The final Sprint Review approval from stakeholders

why.en: The Definition of Done is a shared agreement among the Scrum Team about what 'complete' means. It applies to all work contributing to an Increment and is the commitment for the Increment artifact.
why.sl: Pregled Sprinta se osredotoči na vidne rezultate (Inkreement) in povratne informacije. To je pravi cilj srečanja.

q.en: Work that does not meet the Definition of Done:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga deležnikov pri Načrtovanju Sprinta?

options.en: Should be counted as partially done and reported to stakeholders
Does not become part of the Increment and is not considered delivered
options.sl: Biti dostopni za vprašanja o vrednosti in prioritetah

options.en: Can be released with a note explaining the gaps
Becomes part of the next Sprint's baseline

why.en: The Definition of Done is non-negotiable. Work below the DoD is not part of the Increment and cannot be considered delivered. It returns to the Product Backlog for later work.
why.sl: Deležniki ordinary niso prisotni na Načrtovanju Sprinta. Njihova vloga je biti dostopni za povratne informacije prek Product Ownerja.

q.en: A product has shipped three Increments so far. The Product Owner learns that customers are not using a major feature from Increment 2. The best response is:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši čas za Product Ownerja, da je dostopen timu?

options.en: Require the team to ship more features to offset the unused one and restore stakeholder confidence
Inspect why the feature isn't used and adapt — potentially stopping related investment elsewhere
Assume customers need more time to discover and adopt the feature; do nothing yet
options.sl: Redno in po potrebi med Sprintom

options.en: Release a patch or notification that nudges customers toward using the feature

why.en: Empirical product management means learning from real-world outcomes. If a feature is unused, that is valuable evidence that should inform the PO's next ordering decisions.
why.sl: Product Owner bi moral biti dostopen vse čas med Sprintom. To omogoči hitro razjasnitev in preprečuje blokade.

q.en: A powerful executive pressures the Product Owner to add a low-value feature to the Sprint. The Product Owner should:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše razumevanje Razvijalcev o Cilja Sprinta?

options.en: Comply immediately to maintain the executive's organizational support and goodwill
Refuse outright and escalate the executive's behavior to HR for review
options.sl: To je fleksibilen vodnik, ki ga spremljajo, vendar se spremeni

options.en: Acknowledge input, explain value-based ordering, offer inclusion when priorities shift
options.sl: To je fiksna lista stvari, ki jih je treba narediti

options.en: Hide the request and hope the executive eventually forgets the demand
options.sl: To je ne bistveno za delo

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for maximizing value. While stakeholders are important input sources, the PO makes the ordering decision independently, with clear rationale. Transparency about trade-offs builds trust.
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je fleksibilen, vendar je osrednja zaveza Scrum tima. Vodi delo in akvizicije, a se lahko prilagodi, če se stvari spremene.

q.en: The Product Owner should focus primarily on:
q.sl: Kaj je vloga Scrum Masterja pri upravljanju tveganja?

options.en: Keeping all stakeholders equally happy
Maximizing the value delivered by the product — balancing stakeholder needs with business strategy and outcomes
Delivering every feature proposed by the organization
options.sl: Pomagati timu prepoznati in upravljati tveganja

options.en: Minimizing the team's effort

why.en: The PO's accountability is to maximize product value. This requires integrating many perspectives but making independent decisions about ordering based on value.
why.sl: Scrum Master pomaga timu prepoznati tveganja in jih upravljati. Scrum sam je strateškim okvir za upravljanje negotovosti.

q.en: If a feature was already built and deployed, the cost of building it is sunk and should not influence whether to keep it in the product.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše delo Razvijalcev med Sprintom?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. Sunk costs are irrelevant to future decisions. If a deployed feature delivers no value and consumes maintenance effort, the PO should deprecate it — past investment is not a reason to continue.
why.sl: Razvijalci bi se morali osredotočiti na dogovorjeno delo in dosego cilja Sprinta. To je temeljna odgovornost.

q.en: Evidence-Based Management Key Value Areas help organizations:
q.sl: Kaj je bistveni del Definicije Končanega?

options.en: Eliminate all uncertainty from product planning
options.sl: Kaj Razvijalci čutijo, da je dobro

options.en: Measure and improve the value they deliver, using Current Value, Unrealized Value, Time to Market, and Ability to Innovate
options.sl: Skupni dogovor o standardih za kvaliteto in polnost

options.en: Replace the Product Owner with automated dashboards
Predict future revenue with 100% accuracy

why.en: EBM provides frameworks (KVAs) for understanding and improving value delivery. It acknowledges uncertainty and uses empirical evidence — not prediction — to guide decisions.
why.sl: Definicija Končanega je skupen dogovor. Vse je vključeno: testiranje, dokumentacijo, verzioniranje in drugo, kar je potrebno za Končanega.

q.en: Current Value (CV) in Evidence-Based Management refers to:
q.sl: Kaj se zgodi, če Inkreement ne izpolnjuje Definicije Končanega?

options.en: The original budget allocated to the product
The value the product is currently delivering to customers and the business
options.sl: Se vrne Razvijalcem za dodatno delo

options.en: The projected value after all features are built
The developer salaries paid to build the product
options.sl: Je zavrnjen in se šteje kot izguba

why.en: Current Value measures what the product actually delivers today — customer satisfaction, revenue, usage, retention, etc. It is an outcome measure, not a financial or input measure.
why.sl: Inkreement, ki ne izpolnjuje Definicije Končanega, ni pomožen za uporabo. Vrne se kot delo za opravljanje, ne pa kot končano.

q.en: A Product Owner wants to understand if a new feature will increase product value. The empirical approach is to:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši rezultat Dnevnega Scruma za Scrum Mastera?

options.en: Ask stakeholders to predict the impact
Build and release the feature completely, then measure customer response
options.sl: Razumevanje, kakšne blokade obstajajo in kako jih rešiti

options.en: Release a minimal version to real users, measure actual outcomes, and adapt based on evidence
options.sl: Dokaz, da je Scrum Master bil prisoten

options.en: Commission a consultant study

why.en: Empiricism means testing hypotheses with real users and real data. A minimal release (MVP-style) reduces risk and provides fast feedback for the PO's next decisions.
why.sl: Scrum Master se osredotoči na blokade in kako pomagati. To je ključna vloga - odstraniti ovire za napredek.

q.en: Ability to Innovate (A2I) degrades when:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejša karakteristika učinkovite Retrospektive?

options.en: The team's release frequency exceeds what users have appetite to absorb regularly
Technical debt, rigid architecture, or unclear DoD makes experimentation and capability delivery hard
options.sl: Varno mest za resnično razgovor in izboljšave

options.en: Developer compensation rises faster than the team's measured Sprint output
The Product Backlog has grown beyond a size that can be meaningfully refined

why.en: A2I is the capacity to deliver new capabilities. Technical debt, poor code quality, and unclear standards erode this capacity, slowing innovation. Paying developers well does not degrade A2I.
why.sl: Uspešna Retrospektiva je varno mest, kjer se lahko ljudje izražajo brez strahu. To je bistveno za realne pogovore in izboljšave.

q.en: The Product Owner forecasts delivery of a major feature in four Sprints. What is the most honest way to frame this forecast?
q.sl: Kaj je bistvena odgovornost Product Ownerja glede povratne informacije deležnikov?

options.en: Guarantee that the feature will absolutely ship by the end of Sprint 24 as committed
State it as a range (e.g., 'likely 4–6 Sprints') based on current velocity, updated as learning accrues
options.sl: Sprejeti vse povratne informacije brez sprememb

options.en: Promise the feature by a specific date so stakeholders can plan with full confidence
options.sl: Zbrati povratne informacije in jo vključiti v Produktni seznam

options.en: Decline to forecast at all because empirical work cannot be predicted in advance

why.en: Empirical forecasting is transparent. Forecasts are probability statements based on evidence, not promises. They are expected to change as facts evolve.
why.sl: Product Owner zbira povratne informacije deležnikov in jo vključi v prioritizacijo. To je bistveno za vrednost in zadovoljstvo.

q.en: A Product Owner should measure product success primarily through team velocity and story points completed per Sprint.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše besedilo za Razvijalce, da razumejo od Product Ownerja?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Velocity is a throughput measure, not a value measure. Success should be measured through outcomes — customer satisfaction, revenue, usage, retention — not activity.
why.sl: Razvijalci morajo razumeti vrednost in kontekst. To jih osredotoči in motivira k dosegu cilja.

q.en: The Product Owner learns that a committed feature will likely miss the expected release date. They should:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši indikator zdravega Scrum tima?

options.en: Hide the delay until the last possible moment to preserve stakeholder confidence
Share the evidence with stakeholders, discuss trade-offs (delay, scope, cost), and adapt the plan
Force the team to work weekends and longer hours until the schedule is back on track
Cancel the feature entirely and remove it from the backlog without further discussion

why.en: Transparency is a pillar of empiricism. Early visibility of risks allows stakeholders and the PO to make informed decisions together.
why.sl: Zdrav Scrum tim se nenehno uči in izboljšuje. Samoorganizirajici so in sposobni upravljanja svojih procesov.

q.en: Two Product Backlog items deliver the same total value. Which should the Product Owner prioritize higher?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši fokus Pregleda Sprinta za Product Ownerja?

options.en: The one that takes longer to build
The one that delivers value to customers faster, reducing time-to-market for that capability
options.sl: Zbrati povratne informacije na Inkrementom in prilagoditi Produktni seznam

options.en: The one that was suggested first
They should be ranked equally

why.en: Time to Market is a KVA in EBM. When value is equal, earlier delivery of value typically creates more total value (due to compounding benefits and reduced risk).
why.sl: Product Owner se osredotoči na povratne informacije in prilagoditve. To je ključna povratna kroga za Produktni seznam.

q.en: A Minimum Viable Product (MVP) is best understood as:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Scrum okvira?

options.en: A buggy or incomplete version shipped to cut corners
The smallest release that provides enough value to test a hypothesis with real users
options.sl: Preprosta struktura, ki spodbuja empiričnost in kontinuirano izboljšanje

options.en: The feature set that satisfies all stakeholder requests
A prototype shown only in demos

why.en: An MVP is a learning tool, not a shortcut. It is the smallest release that enables validated learning from actual customers about what delivers value.
why.sl: Scrum je preprost okvir, vendar je temeljil na empiričnosti. Omogoča prilagajanje, medtem ko ohranja strukturo.

q.en: The Product Owner should update their forecast when:
q.sl: Kaj je bistvena vloga Scrum Masterja s Produktnim Ownerjem?

options.en: Only at the end of the quarter
Never — forecasts should not change
options.sl: Pomagati mu razumeti vloge in odgovornosti

options.en: Regularly, as new empirical data emerges (velocity trends, complexity insights, stakeholder feedback)
Only when executives demand it

why.en: Forecasts are empirical tools. They improve as the Scrum Team learns more about the product, the domain, and their own capacity. Stale forecasts are inaccurate.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach za Product Ownerja. Pomaga mu razumeti in izvajati svojo vlogo učinkovito.

q.en: How should the Product Owner handle conflicting stakeholder priorities?
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši rezultat Načrtovanja Sprinta?

options.en: Give each stakeholder an equal vote on the final backlog ordering decision
Let the loudest stakeholder win to minimize ongoing organizational friction
options.sl: Dogovorjen cilj Sprinta in seznam dela

options.en: Order the backlog by product value, incorporating all perspectives but making the final decision
Escalate the conflict to executive leadership and let them decide priorities

why.en: The Product Owner is accountable for value maximization. While stakeholders are important input sources, the PO weighs all perspectives and makes an independent ordering decision.
why.sl: Rezultat je jasno definiran cilj Sprinta in seznam dela, ki ga je Scrum tim dogovoril, da ga bo dosegel.

q.en: Unrealized Value (UV) in EBM measures:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši razlog za rabo Iterativnega pristopa v Scrum-u?

options.en: Work that was started by the team but never finished or shipped to users
The gap between value customers realize today and what they could realize if needs were fully met
options.sl: Zmožnost učenja in prilagajanja na podlagi resničnih rezultatov

options.en: Money lost to inefficient spending or under-utilized engineering investment
Features that were deployed to production but never adopted by any users

why.en: Unrealized Value is the opportunity gap. It informs the PO's strategy: where is the biggest value gap, and how can the product close it?
why.sl: Iterativni pristop omogoča ekipam da se naučijo in prilagodijo. To je jedro empiričnosti v Scrum-u.

q.en: An Increment may be released to users before the Sprint ends, as soon as it meets the Definition of Done.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik transparentnosti v Scrum-u?

options.en: True
False

why.en: Multiple Increments may be created within a Sprint, and any Increment that meets the Definition of Done may be delivered to users before the Sprint ends. Release timing is the Product Owner's decision; the Sprint is not a release boundary.
why.sl: Transparentnost pomeni, da ključni pogoji (delo, prioritete, cilje) jasno vidljivi vsem. To omogoči boljše odločitve.

q.en: Time to Market (T2M) in Evidence-Based Management is important because:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejše delo Razvijalcev pri samoorganizirovanju?

options.en: Shipping faster always generates more revenue
The ability to deliver new capabilities quickly increases learning speed and competitive advantage
options.sl: Skupaj se dogovoriti kako delo opraviti

options.en: Developers should work longer hours
Marketing timelines determine product delivery

why.en: T2M is the speed of delivering new capabilities. Shorter T2M enables faster learning and earlier value capture — key competitive and product management advantages.
why.sl: Samoupravničeni Razvijalci skupaj se dogovorijo kako delo organizirati in opraviti. To je bistvena karakteristika efektivnega tima.

q.en: When three Scrum Teams contribute to the same product:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši razlog, da Product Owner mora biti "One person, not a committee"?

options.en: Each team has its own Product Backlog and Product Owner
They share one Product Goal, one Product Backlog, and one Product Owner accountable for value
options.sl: Jasna odgovornost in avtoriteta za prioritizacijo

options.en: One team manages the Product Backlog while others build
The Scrum Master coordinates backlog ordering across teams

why.en: Even at scale, a single product has a single Product Goal, single Product Backlog, and single Product Owner. This preserves a single source of truth for value direction.
why.sl: Ena oseba pomeni jasno odgovornost in avtoriteto. To preprečuje zmešnjavo in omogoči hitre, jasne odločitve.

q.en: When scaling to multiple Scrum Teams on one product, the Definition of Done should be:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Cilja Sprinta?

options.en: Different for each team to avoid slowing progress
Decided by each team independently
options.sl: Biti dosegljiv in voden od Razvijalci

options.en: Consistent across all teams so their work integrates reliably into a quality Increment
options.sl: Biti fiksni ne glede na spremembe

options.en: Set by the Product Owner and enforced strictly without team input

why.en: A shared Definition of Done ensures that all work — from all teams — meets the same quality and readiness standards. Consistency is essential when multiple teams integrate into one product.
why.sl: Cilj Sprinta je dosegljiv in dogovorjen s Scrum timom. To daje osredotočenost in jasnost za delo.

q.en: Scrum is founded on:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši rezultat Retrospektive Sprinta?

options.en: Prediction and long-term planning
A prescriptive set of practices that must never change
Empiricism — transparency, inspection, and adaptation — and lean thinking
Hierarchical decision-making

why.en: The Scrum Guide 2020 explicitly states that Scrum is founded on empiricism and lean thinking. Empiricism drives decisions through transparency and learning; lean thinking eliminates waste and focuses on essentials.
why.sl: Retrospektiva bi morala voditi do konkretnih, izvedljivih izboljšav. To je cilj - ne samo preident, temveč dejanja.

q.en: Scrum is a methodology that prescribes exactly how to build products.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Inkrementov v Scrum-u?

options.en: True
False

why.en: False. Scrum is a lightweight framework. It provides roles, events, and artifacts but is not prescriptive about engineering practices or methodologies. Teams adapt Scrum to their context.
why.sl: Inkreement je potencialno učinkuje in mora izpolnjeti Definicijo Končanega. To je bistveno za vrednost.

q.en: The purpose of Product Backlog refinement is to:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Dnevnega Scruma?

options.en: Lock down all requirements before development starts
Add detail, clarity, estimates, and order to items so the Scrum Team can efficiently plan and execute
options.sl: Biti osredotočen na kako dosegti cilja Sprinta in kaj blokira

options.en: Reduce the Product Backlog size
Give the Product Owner full control over all technical decisions

why.en: Refinement is an ongoing collaborative activity that prepares the Backlog for effective Sprint Planning. It increases transparency and shared understanding without locking requirements.
why.sl: Dnevni Scrum je za osredotočenost in sinhronizacijo. Fokus je na napredka in blokadah, ne pa na poročanju.

q.en: A Product Owner realizes a decision was wrong based on actual customer feedback. They should:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Produktnega seznama?

options.en: Defend the decision to save face
Ignore the feedback and continue the original plan
options.sl: Biti živabna in prioritizirana glede na vrednost

options.en: Inspect the evidence, adapt the Product Backlog and strategy based on learning, and communicate the change transparently
Blame the Developers for not building it correctly

why.en: Empiricism means learning from reality and adapting. If evidence shows a decision was wrong, the PO pivots — this is not failure, it is intelligence.
why.sl: Produktni seznam je živa lista, prioritizirana glede na vrednost. To ga dela učinkovitim orodjem za upravljanje dela.

q.en: The Product Owner should engage stakeholders:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Scrum Master vloge?

options.en: Only at the Sprint Review
Only at the start of a release
options.sl: Coach in facilitator za tim in organization

options.en: Continuously throughout the Sprint whenever it helps clarify value, refine backlog items, or gather feedback
Through written status reports only

why.en: The Sprint Review is one structured engagement point, but the PO should collaborate with stakeholders continuously. Frequent interaction protects against building the wrong thing.
why.sl: Scrum Master je coach in facilitator. Njihova vloga je olajšati Scrum okvir in pomagati timu biti efektivni.

q.en: The Product Owner is pressured to lower quality standards to meet a deadline. They should:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Product Owner vloge?

options.en: Agree to release work below the Definition of Done to meet the committed deadline
Refuse the deadline pressure and cancel the Sprint to protect quality standards
options.sl: Maksimaliziranje vrednosti produkta in upravljanje Produktnega seznama

options.en: Collaborate with the Developers on the trade-off and negotiate scope reduction to keep quality
Delegate the trade-off decision to the Scrum Master to mediate the conflict

why.en: The PO is accountable for long-term value. Shipping below the Definition of Done creates technical debt and erodes value. The solution is scope negotiation, not quality compromise.
why.sl: Product Owner je odgovoren za vrednost. To počne skozi upravljanje Produktnega seznama in prioritizacijo.

q.en: A Product Owner should understand the organization's business strategy and ensure the Product Goal aligns with it.
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Razvojne vloge?

options.en: True
False

why.en: True. The Product Goal translates business strategy into product direction. The PO bridges stakeholder/business needs and the Scrum Team's work.
why.sl: Razvijalci so odgovorni za dostavo Inkrementov. To je skupna odgovornost vseh v timu.

q.en: When determining whether an Increment is ready for release, the Product Owner should check:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši vidik Scrum procesa?

options.en: Whether all Sprints since the last release are complete
Whether the Increment meets the Definition of Done and whether releasing it creates more value than waiting
Whether the executive team approves
Whether the team has worked enough Sprints

why.en: The Increment is release-ready when it meets the Definition of Done. The release decision itself depends on value, risk, and market timing — the PO's judgment call.
why.sl: Scrum je empiričan okvir, ki se prilagaja. Ima strukturo, vendar je fleksibilen glede na potrebe organizacije.

q.en: The best Product Owner attitude toward changing requirements or pivoting the Product Goal is:
q.sl: Kaj je najpomembnejši rezultat Scrum-a?

options.en: Resist change to protect the original plan
Accept all suggested changes immediately
Welcome evidence-based change while maintaining focus; adapt when evidence shows a better path
Avoid making any decisions

why.en: Empirical product management requires adaptability grounded in evidence. The PO maintains focus on the Product Goal but pivots when evidence shows a better direction.
why.sl: Scrum je namenjena dostavi vrednosti in kontinuiranemu učenju. To je bistveni cilj okvira.
